title: lastreopsis recedens
intro: Lastreopsis recedens, also known as Mountain Fern, is a type of fern native to Australia and New Zealand. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lastreopsis recedens include treating conditions such as rheumatism and skin irritations, as well as acting as a natural antiseptic. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and decoctions, often used to soothe and calm the skin.
